name: Shenzhen Mingdiao Decoration Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Mingdiao Decoration Co., Ltd. provides professional and integrated decoration services for large and medium-sized apartment and luxury residential customers in China. The company offers design, engineering construction, material purchase, furniture customization, soft furnishing, and after-sales services. Shenzhen Mingdiao Decoration Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
